findings.message: No installation or invocation instructions — CLAUDE.md has no 'claude plugin install' command or equivalent usage guidance
tests/integration/simmer-scenario.md exists but CLAUDE.md provides no command or instructions to run the integration tests
More than 60% of CLAUDE.md is descriptive content (overview, tables, flow diagrams, key design decisions) rather than actionable instructions
CLAUDE.md has no prerequisites section — does not state 'none required' or list required tools/versions for the plugin

CLAUDE.md directory structure listing (lines 82-91) omits skills/simmer-judge-board/ — the subdirectory exists on disk and simmer-judge-board is referenced in the Subskills table at line 20, but the directory tree is incomplete
Orchestrator SKILL.md is 550 lines, exceeding the 500-line ceiling; the single-agent mode section (lines ~405-418) and context discipline table add ~35 lines that could be extracted
Vague quantifier 'appropriate' in '(or appropriate extension matching artifact type)' — no measurable criteria for extension selection
Vague quantifier 'relevant' in 'Judges must read the relevant artifacts before scoring' — no specification of which artifacts are relevant
Vague quantifier 'relevant' in 'Reference prior iterations when relevant' — no condition specified for when prior iterations are relevant
Vague quantifier 'relevant' in 'Give each judge relevant capabilities from the primitive library' — no criteria for which capabilities are relevant to which judge roles
Vague quantifier 'relevant' in 'Apply relevant ones to each judge based on their role'
Vague quantifier 'relevant' in 'read the candidate, evaluator output, and relevant code/config' — 'relevant' does not specify which code or config files to read
Vague quantifier 'relevant' in 'Extract what's relevant to the criteria' — no measurable guidance for which evaluator output maps to which criteria
Vague quantifier 'relevant' in 'search for relevant techniques' — no specification of what makes a technique relevant
Vague quantifier 'some' in 'If some fields are missing or ambiguous' — 'some' provides no measurable threshold for when the conversational path is triggered vs. skipping to Phase 5
No installation or invocation instructions — CLAUDE.md has no 'claude plugin install' command or equivalent usage guidance
